memory-sessions-p3-p4-2026-07-07.value: P3 (ed267b7): sera ask = question->brief->hypotheses->generated experiments->ANSWER panel+table+report; tests mock scriptgen at module boundary. First live scriptgen run validated repair loop (truncation syntax error repaired). P4 (861a0b0): engine/ledger.py append-only vault/ledger.jsonl (gitignored) with record/query(token-overlap)/stats/compute_verdict(survived|killed|failed); hypothesis.generate(memory=True) injects PAST RESEARCH OUTCOMES block, audit-logged to engine/logs/<client>/hypgen-*.log; predicted_winner frontmatter required + scriptgen forces label verbatim into conditions; ANSWER = condition vote (raw winner_values are incommensurable across experiments — P3 flaw); validate_script rejects neg_* metric names; sera memory stats. Suite: 120 passed. PENDING: P4 live evidence blocked — API account out of credits; rerun commands are in docs/evidence/p4.md, then update that file and push.

confidence.reason: 120 tests green; live P3 run verified; P4 blocker reproduced

instinct-preflight-external-deps.value: Trigger: a session's definition-of-done includes a LIVE external call (API run, deploy, paid service). Action: preflight the dependency FIRST and cheaply (key present? account usable? one tiny call) before hours of build work, and design the session order so tested-but-unproven work can still be committed with an honest 'evidence pending' note if the dependency fails; clean infrastructure-failure records out of data stores (they are not domain outcomes). Evidence: 2026-07-03 P3 gate failed on missing ANTHROPIC_API_KEY; 2026-07-07 P4 key existed but account had no credits — billing failures briefly polluted the outcome ledger and were removed. Confidence: 0.75 (two occurrences).

confidence.reason: Two occurrences across P3 and P4 sessions

instinct-verify-claimed-files.value: Trigger: task premise says files/artifacts already exist ('pre-written', 'already in repo'). Action: verify exhaustively before acting (working tree, git history --all, branches/stashes, common user dirs); if absent and the contract is fully specified, author to spec and disclose the deviation prominently in the commit body and final report — never pretend the provided artifact was used. Evidence: 2026-07-03 runner integration — claimed runner.py + ref_chunking_retrieval.py existed nowhere; authored to spec, all 90 tests green, disclosed in 7c241b8. Confidence: 0.6 (pending, single occurrence).

runner-integration-session-2026-07-03.value: Commit 7c241b8: real experiment execution shipped. engine/runner.py: attach_script copies script into client experiments/ + records in frontmatter; run() executes via subprocess, writes engine/logs/<client>/run-<exp>-NNN.log, parses final SERA_METRICS JSON line {metric, conditions}, logs results, selects winner. engine/experiments/ref_chunking_retrieval.py = deterministic stdlib MRR benchmark (winner fixed_128_words@1.0). CLI: experiment attach/run (positional args, rich table). sera_config llm -> anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6. tests/test_runner.py; suite 90 passed. WARNING: task claimed runner.py + ref script were pre-written in repo root but they existed nowhere (checked history, branches, Downloads) — authored from scratch to spec, disclosed in commit body. .gitignore no longer ignores engine/experiments/ (would have silently excluded source). Use py -3.14; PATH python = hermes venv without pytest.

confidence.reason: All 90 tests green, CLI e2e verified on demo-ai-eng

sera-project-definition.value: SERA Vault OS = local-first Research-as-a-Service OS + Obsidian. Creates client vaults, generates hypotheses, runs experiments, logs results, selects winners, generates reports. Root: C:/Users/User/sera-vault-os

sera-architecture.value: 5 sessions: S0=shared foundation (done), S1=cli/, S2=vault/, S3=engine/, S4=reports/. Each session owns its folder only. Uses git worktrees for parallel sessions.

sera-session-rules.value: Rules: each session owns only its folder; read nemp_memory.json first; update nemp_memory.json after; import only from shared/; git worktree per session; never overwrite existing work.

sera-session-0-complete.value: Session 0 complete (2026-05-12). Files: sera_config.json, nemp_memory.json, requirements.txt, .gitignore, shared/__init__.py, shared/config.py, shared/file_io.py, shared/validators.py, tests/test_smoke.py. 21/21 smoke tests pass. Committed to master.

sera-integration-complete.value: Integration complete 2026-05-12. 79/79 tests pass. E2E smoke test: create vault, write brief, generate 3 hyps, create exp, log 2 results (A=0.09 B=0.17), select winner (B), generate 3545-byte report. 1 bug fixed: cli vault init used 'reports/' instead of 'results/'.

sera-next-steps.value: SERA Vault OS v0.1.0 shipped. Next: install deps (pip install -r requirements.txt), run 'python -m cli.main --help', set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for AI features.

sera-worktrees.value: 4 worktrees merged into master (2026-05-12). sera-session-1=session/cli, sera-session-2=session/vault, sera-session-3=session/engine, sera-session-4=session/reports.

sera-folder-ownership.value: Folder ownership: sera-session-1 owns cli/ only; sera-session-2 owns vault/ only; sera-session-3 owns engine/ only; sera-session-4 owns reports/ only. All sessions may read shared/ but must not modify it.

sera-session-2-complete.value: Session 2 complete (2026-05-12). vault/__init__.py, scaffold.py, 4 JSON schemas, 5 templates. create_client_vault() and list_vaults() smoke-tested.

confidence.reason: All files created and smoke-tested successfully

sera-vault-api.value: vault/scaffold.py: create_client_vault(client_id)->Path creates vault/clients/{id}/ with briefs/, hypotheses/, experiments/, results/, _meta.md. list_vaults()->list[str].

sera-session-1-complete.value: Session 1 complete (2026-05-12). CLI module built with Click. Commands: vault init/list/status (live), hypothesis generate/list, experiment create/list, report generate/list. Stubs graceful when engine/reports missing. Committed to session/cli branch. Entry: python -m cli.main.

confidence.reason: CLI verified via python -m cli.main --help and all command paths tested

sera-cli-contracts.value: CLI stubs expect these interfaces when sessions 3+4 are built: engine.hypothesis.generate(client, brief_id); engine.experiment.create(client, hypothesis_id); reports.generator.generate(client, brief_id). CLI detects missing modules via ImportError and degrades gracefully.

sera-shared-api.value: shared/config.py: CONFIG + get_path(key) + PROJECT_ROOT. shared/file_io.py: ensure_dir(path), read_markdown(path)->(fm,body), write_markdown(path,body,fm). shared/validators.py: validate_schema(data,schema,ctx)->errors, assert_valid(data,schema,ctx). Python 3.14.3.
